items.title: The Derrick White trade was one of the most successful in recent Celtics memory. And it came out of nowhere.
items.author: Jack Simone
items.body_excerpt:
The Derrick White trade was one of the most successful in recent Celtics memory. And it came out of nowhere.

An already-solid player blossomed into a star role player when placed in the right situation.

Boston needs to replicate that.

media.title: The Celtics need to find the next Derrick White trade
media.description: When the Boston Celtics traded for Derrick White in 2022, it came as a surprise. A deadline deal that seemingly spawned out of thin air. Boston needs to find its next Derrick White-esque trade.

items.title: Every time I see Derrick White’s name pop up in trade speculation, I remember what the Celtics offense looked like before he arrived and became their chief connector. Seems like a lot of Celtics fans take that for granted now. I doubt Brad does. It’s really hard to find.

items.title: Derrick White earns a spot on the All-Defensive First Team.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Derrick White earns a spot on the All-Defensive First Team.

-1/2 players with at least 80 steals & 80+ blocks (Scottie Barnes)

-3rd in defensive win shares

-Most shots contested among guards

-1st Celtic with 75+ blocks and 75+ steals in a season since when Kevin Garnett won the DPOY in 2007-08
